title: TABSMP Resource pack
description: This is the resource pack for the TABSMP Modpack. It changes the Title Image, Panorama, Splash text and credits.
body: This resource pack can change the title image, panorama, credits and the splash text to fit with the Seasons of the TABSMP, coinciding with the TABSMP Modpack. Currently, the resource pack includes Season 3, 4, and now 5 versions, the title image, panorama, credits and splash texts have changed.
